description.description: An optional free-form description for the reversal ledger transaction. Maximum of 1000 characters allowed.

status.description: Status of the reversal ledger transaction. It defaults to `posted` if not provided.

metadata.description: Additional data to be added to the reversal ledger transaction as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.

effective_at.description: The timestamp (ISO8601 format) at which the reversal ledger transaction happened for reporting purposes. It defaults to the `effective_at` of the original ledger transaction if not provided.

external_id.description: Must be unique within the ledger.

ledgerable_type.description: Specify this if you'd like to link the reversal ledger transaction to a Payment object like Return or Reversal.

ledgerable_id.description: Specify this if you'd like to link the reversal ledger transaction to a Payment object like Return or Reversal.
